shortCompanyReason: Established bus operator providing local and regional services with a focus on reliability and customer service.
shortRoleReason: Senior position leading depot operations, driving service quality, and managing operational teams.
probablePriorities: Maintain punctual and reliable bus services
advertSummary: Diamond Bus Limited is seeking a Senior Operations Supervisor to lead depot operations in Oldbury. Reporting to the Operations Manager, the role involves managing supervisors, drivers, and traffic office functions, ensuring safe and reliable services, and driving operational improvements. A flexible schedule is required, with occasional night shifts.
personalisedIntro: Experienced operational leader with a proven track record in transport management, skilled in optimising depot performance, leading teams, and ensuring high service standards.
whyThisRole: This role offers the opportunity to take a strategic operational leadership position, influence service quality, and develop high-performing teams within a busy transport environment.
